title: Review and dismiss 1,627 overdue stale tasks
description: 1,627 NOT_STARTED tasks are overdue (due date before 2026-04-22). The oldest date back to September 2025. The majority are auto-generated HubSpot tasks with subjects like 'Add outcome for Call with [contact name]'. These appear to be a systemic artifact of HubSpot's call logging workflow — tasks auto-created when a call is logged but no outcome is entered. They are not intentional follow-up tasks. However, some may include genuine TODO items mixed in.

sample_records.subject: Add outcome for Call with Randy Holmquist
Add outcome for Call with Vernon Grant
Add outcome for Call with Atavia Moorer
Add outcome for Call with Caller +18138237096
Update outcome for meeting with Patriot Haulers Llc
Update outcome for meeting with Nestled Llc

recommendation: DISMISS_CALL_OUTCOME_TASKS: Bulk-mark as COMPLETED all tasks matching pattern 'Add outcome for Call with' or 'Update outcome for meeting with' that are >60 days overdue. Keep any tasks with custom subjects (genuine TODOs) for manual review.
risk: LOW — these are auto-generated bookkeeping tasks with no deal/revenue impact
approval_options: APPROVE_DISMISS_ALL: Mark all 1,627 overdue tasks as completed (fastest cleanup)
APPROVE_DISMISS_CALL_OUTCOME_ONLY: Only dismiss 'Add outcome' / 'Update outcome' pattern tasks
REJECT: Leave tasks as-is, agent will not touch them
DEFER: Revisit next heartbeat with more analysis
